name: list_devices
description: List all smart home devices, optionally filtered by type or location.

name: set_device_state
description: Set the state of a smart home device (e.g. turn on/off, set temperature, adjust brightness).

device_id.description: The unique ID of the device.

state.description: Key-value pairs representing the desired device state (e.g. {"power": "on", "brightness": 75}).

name: get_device_status
description: Get the current status and readings of a specific smart home device.

device_id.description: The unique ID of the device.

name: set_schedule
description: Create or update an automation schedule for a device.

device_id.description: The unique ID of the device to schedule.

time.description: Time to trigger the schedule in HH:MM format (24-hour).

days.description: Days of the week when the schedule is active (e.g. ['monday', 'wednesday', 'friday']).

action.description: The device state to apply when the schedule triggers (e.g. {"power": "off"}).

name: get_camera_feed
description: Retrieve the latest camera feed or snapshot from a security camera.

camera_id.description: The unique ID of the camera device.

mode.description: Retrieval mode: 'snapshot' for a still image URL, or 'stream' for a live stream URL.

name: unlock_door
description: Remotely unlock a smart lock. This is a security-sensitive action.

lock_id.description: The unique ID of the smart lock device.

duration.description: Number of seconds to keep the door unlocked before auto-locking. Default 30.
